title: Peter's Baby
writer: Floyd Dell, Thomas Mitchell, Børge Müller
actors: Ebbe Langberg, Ghita Nørby, Dario Campeotto
plot: Peter Bergman receives a letter the day before his wedding, from a French hospital regarding the need for a bloodtest. He puts two and two together, and figures out he has a kid with a Danish girl he met in Paris. He goes to the h...
